Title: Register User with Valid Credentials
Steps:
Step 1: Navigate to homepage.
Step 2: Click 'Signup / Login'.
Step 3: Enter valid name and email.
Step 4: Click 'Signup'.
Step 5: Fill all required fields.
Step 6: Click 'Create Account'.
Test Data: Name: John Doe, Email: john.doe@test.com, Password: Test1234!
Expected Result: User is registered, and a confirmation message is displayed.

Title: Login with Valid Credentials
Steps:
Step 1: Navigate to homepage.
Step 2: Click 'Signup / Login'.
Step 3: Enter valid email and password.
Step 4: Click 'Login'.
Expected Result: User is logged in, and the homepage displays the user’s name.

Title: Login with Invalid Password
Steps:
Step 1: Navigate to homepage.
Step 2: Click 'Signup / Login'.
Step 3: Enter valid email and incorrect password.
Step 4: Click 'Login'.
Expected Result: Error message 'Your email or password is incorrect!' is displayed.

Title: Register with Existing Email
Steps:
Step 1: Navigate to homepage.
Step 2: Click 'Signup / Login'.
Step 3: Enter name and existing email.
Step 4: Click 'Signup'.
Expected Result: Error message 'Email Address already exists!' is displayed.

Title: Register with Missing Required Fields
Steps:
Step 1: Navigate to homepage.
Step 2: Click 'Signup / Login'.
Step 3: Enter name and email.
Step 4: Click 'Signup'.
Step 5: Leave password field empty.
Step 6: Click 'Create Account'.
Expected Result: Error message indicating missing required fields is displayed.

Title: Login with Unregistered Email
Steps:
Step 1: Navigate to homepage.
Step 2: Click 'Signup / Login'.
Step 3: Enter unregistered email and password.
Step 4: Click 'Login'.
Expected Result: Error message 'Your email or password is incorrect!' is displayed.

Title: Password Field Boundary Test (Max Length)
Steps:
Step 1: Navigate to homepage.
Step 2: Click 'Signup / Login'.
Step 3: Enter name and email.
Step 4: Click 'Signup'.
Step 5: Enter a password exceeding max length.
Step 6: Click 'Create Account'.
Expected Result: Error message indicating password exceeds maximum length is displayed.

Title: Login with Empty Fields
Steps:
Step 1: Navigate to homepage.
Step 2: Click 'Signup / Login'.
Step 3: Leave email and password fields empty.
Step 4: Click 'Login'.
Expected Result: Error message indicating required fields are empty is displayed.

Title: Logout Functionality
Steps:
Step 1: Login with valid credentials.
Step 2: Click 'Logout' from the top navigation.
Step 3: Confirm logout action.
Expected Result: User is logged out, and the 'Signup / Login' option is visible.

Title: Session Persistence After Login
Steps:
Step 1: Login with valid credentials.
Step 2: Navigate to Products page.
Step 3: Add a product to cart.
Step 4: Refresh the page.
Step 5: Check cart contents.
Expected Result: Cart retains the added product after page refresh.

Title: View All Products
Steps:
Step 1: Navigate to homepage.
Step 2: Click 'Products'.
Step 3: Scroll through product list.
Step 4: Select a product.
Expected Result: Product details page loads with correct product information.

Title: Filter Products by Category
Steps:
Step 1: Navigate to Products page.
Step 2: Select 'Women' category.
Step 3: Choose 'Tops' subcategory.
Step 4: View product list.
Expected Result: Only products from the 'Tops' subcategory are displayed.

Title: Search Products with Valid Keyword
Steps:
Step 1: Navigate to Products page.
Step 2: Enter a valid keyword in the search bar.
Step 3: Click the search icon.
Step 4: View search results.
Expected Result: Products matching 'Dress' are displayed.

Title: Search Products with Invalid Keyword
Steps:
Step 1: Navigate to Products page.
Step 2: Enter an invalid keyword in the search bar.
Step 3: Click the search icon.
Expected Result: No products are displayed, and a 'No results found' message appears.

Title: Filter Products by Price Range
Steps:
Step 1: Navigate to Products page.
Step 2: Select a price range filter.
Step 3: Apply the filter.
Step 4: View product list.
Expected Result: Only products within the $10-$50 price range are displayed.

Title: Clear Applied Filters
Steps:
Step 1: Navigate to Products page.
Step 2: Apply a category filter.
Step 3: Apply a price filter.
Step 4: Click 'Clear Filters'.
Step 5: View product list.
Expected Result: All products are displayed without any filters applied.

Title: Sort Products by Price (Low to High)
Steps:
Step 1: Navigate to Products page.
Step 2: Select 'Price: Low to High' from sort options.
Step 3: Apply sorting.
Step 4: View product list.
Expected Result: Products are displayed in ascending order of price.

Title: Search with Special Characters
Steps:
Step 1: Navigate to Products page.
Step 2: Enter special characters in the search bar.
Step 3: Click the search icon.
Expected Result: No products are displayed, and a 'No results found' message appears.

Title: View Product Details
Steps:
Step 1: Navigate to Products page.
Step 2: Select a product.
Step 3: View product details.
Step 4: Add to cart.
Expected Result: Product is added to cart, and cart icon updates.

Title: Filter with Invalid Price Range
Steps:
Step 1: Navigate to Products page.
Step 2: Enter an invalid price range.
Step 3: Apply the filter.
Expected Result: Error message indicating invalid price range is displayed.

Title: Add Product to Cart
Steps:
Step 1: Navigate to Products page.
Step 2: Select a product.
Step 3: Click 'Add to Cart'.
Step 4: View cart.
Expected Result: Product is added to cart, and cart displays correct product details.

Title: Remove Product from Cart
Steps:
Step 1: Add a product to cart.
Step 2: Navigate to Cart page.
Step 3: Click 'Remove' on the product.
Step 4: Confirm removal.
Expected Result: Product is removed, and cart is empty or updated.

Title: Update Cart Quantity
Steps:
Step 1: Add a product to cart.
Step 2: Navigate to Cart page.
Step 3: Change quantity to 5.
Step 4: Click 'Update Cart'.
Expected Result: Cart updates with correct quantity and total price.

Title: Add Multiple Products to Cart
Steps:
Step 1: Navigate to Products page.
Step 2: Add Product A to cart.
Step 3: Add Product B to cart.
Step 4: Navigate to Cart page.
Test Data: Product A: Blue Top, Product B: Men Tshirt
Expected Result: Cart displays both products with correct details.

Title: Update Cart with Negative Quantity
Steps:
Step 1: Add a product to cart.
Step 2: Navigate to Cart page.
Step 3: Enter negative quantity.
Step 4: Click 'Update Cart'.
Expected Result: Error message indicating invalid quantity is displayed.
